Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I go to sleep early today...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I take a nap until then...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have a very important task tonight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I take a nap until then?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There is no school today.[n]Should I take a nap...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go to sleep early so I'm[n]ready for the first day of school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_CLOSET_0406
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should probably go to sleep early today.[n]But I should put my stuff away first...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should put my stuff away in the closet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today's the Promised Day...[n]I should head to Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm feeling terribly chilly...[n]I may have caught a cold...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think I can stay awake any longer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was told to go to the fourth floor today...[n]{f 1 1}
